title: pellionia pellucida
intro: Pellionia pellucida, also known as manjishthadi quercifolium, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions, particularly in the Western Ghats of India and Southeast Asia. It is a shrub-like plant with ovate leaves and small white flowers, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, respiratory problems, and digestive disorders, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Pellionia pellucida can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts can also be used in traditional medicine.
